name: Misho Ecology & Landscape Co.,Ltd.
summary: Misho Ecology & Landscape Co.,Ltd. engages in the ecological restoration and environmental construction business in China. The company is involved in the ecological restoration and landscape, and eco-tourism activities, as well as resources recycling and agricultural product development. It also repairs and reconstructs ecological environment. The company was formerly known as Jiangsu Misho Ecology Landscape Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Misho Ecology & Landscape Co.,Ltd. in April 2016. The company was founded in 2001 and is headquartered in Wuxi, China.
